layman_headline: The whole crypto market is bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: Bitcoin dropped below $62,000 and dragged nearly every altcoin down with it. The market mood is fearful at 28/100, and Bitcoin dominance at 55.9% means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. Every candidate on the watchlist has significant technical problems — bearish charts, poor risk/reward ratios, or overbought conditions after recent spikes. None of the setups offer a clean entry with a favorable risk/reward.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for the fear to deepen further (below 20) or for a clear reversal signal like a volume breakout or bullish MACD cross. The best trades come from patience during selloffs like this.
expert_reasoning: Across all 8 swing candidates, not a single one presents a high-confidence setup. DEXE is overbought at RSI 77 after a 37% weekly rally with an 18% single-day reversal — classic blow-off top. KITE has a -1.40 chart bias with a bearish Marubozu. GRASS dropped 31% in a week but shows a bearish engulfing pattern with poor 0.48x R/R. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) but terrible 0.11x R/R with resistance at $0.40 only 2.5% away. JTO is the most balanced candidate but entering longs against a fearful, BTC-dominant market with no volume breakout confirmation contradicts our highest-reliability signal types. Fear & Greed at 28 is improving from 24.6 weekly average, but hasn't reached extreme fear levels that historically mark bottoms. I'd rather wait for a capitulation flush or a volume-confirmed reversal.
risk_factors: BTC could break below $60K on geopolitical escalation (Hormuz Strait), dragging all alts down another 10-20%
BTC dominance at 55.9% and rising means alt season is nowhere near — capital continues rotating out of altcoins
No volume breakout signals detected on any candidate — our most reliable signal type (100% win rate) is absent
watch_list: BTC price action around $60,000 support — a break below could trigger cascading liquidations
Fear & Greed index — watch for a drop below 15 (extreme fear) which historically marks buying opportunities
JTO and ETHFI for volume breakouts if BTC stabilizes above $60K in the next 48 hours
market_context: The crypto market is in a broad risk-off mode with BTC down 3.2% in 24 hours threatening $62K. Geopolitical tensions, Strategy pausing BTC purchases, and high BTC dominance create a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Market-wide sell-off with no reliable entry signals — capital preservation is the priority until a volume-confirmed reversal appears.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 28 (Fear) is improving from last week's 24.6 average but hasn't reached extreme fear levels that historically mark high-confidence contrarian entries.
Bitcoin threatens $62K amid geopolitical risk (Hormuz Strait) — macro headwinds creating downside pressure across all crypto assets.
Strategy paused Bitcoin buying to hoard $3B cash, removing a key demand source and signaling institutional caution.
No candidates are in true oversold territory (below 30). Best candidate JTO sits at RSI 59 which is already slightly elevated, while DEXE at 77 is dangerously overbought.
Zero volume breakout signals detected across all candidates — our highest-reliability indicator (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
